transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today,
I have bibimbap (mixed rice with sauce and vegetables) and Kimchi stew(?)
It has pork inside but so I get it's like stir-fried kimchi with pork
Just these 2
This is about 3-4 servings
This is 4 servings
8 servings total Bon appetit
[Chat: You're eating veggies now?] If I want
It's going to be a little too salty if I put all the sauce
So let's just do 3 and a half
There
There's just too much in there
Sesame oil Right
A lot
Put everything

Look how much I have
Mix!
No, I'm not making kimchi
This is bibimbap
I was going to eat 100 fried cheeseballs
But I didn't want greasy food today
It splashed
I love bibimbap so much
I don't eat it too often But I've been craving it lately
The perilla leaf keeps getting scooped
There's a lot of meat in here
I asked for extra
This is a stew with kimchi, pork, tofu
Yum
[Chat: Change the location of the pot and the bowl] No I can't
Should I?

Okay, that's so much better
This isn't how you eat bibimbap
I can't really eat it properly because it's heavy
I ate it like this last time
Ta-da
Enoki mushroom just looks good
It's not bad
I blew on it again
I always blow on my food I don't know why
Of course I put eggs in here
It's supposed to be sunny-side up, but these are over-easy

I don't like tofu
Meat
There's a lot

So I can't

Wait a second
Dried seaweed
This is not a spicy chicken stew
Stir-fried kimchi with pork
It's delicious
There's not much broth in here
What's so spicy here?
I feel a little down today for no reason

It's tasty

Pork neck?

Okay maybe the neck
Yes it is
It needs more fat
I'm already almost finished with it
There's not much left
The canned-tuna is from No Brand
I bought it because it was very interesting
It has a lot of oil in it

Let's turn this down

Cold Spicy Noodles

I'm not feeling that great today

I really enjoyed that baby octopus, beef small intestines, and shrimp mukbang
I want it again

Oh, right
